objective: Resolve KG-001 (Driver-Side Front Door Harness Routing & Interface Topology).
success_criteria: Acquire one (1) verified OEM vehicle-line wiring source (local bytes + SHA-256 + Hard Rule 4 progress).
OR acquire two (2) verified Tier-1 supplier connector/routing specification layouts (hashed).
OR ingest one (1) physical asset teardown or laser scan payload (hashed).
notes: Primary assignment: acquire 2019 Super Duty EWD (SRC-CAND-000006 / EDTS-OEM-004).
Verified = local hashed bytes — not URL indexing or narrative count cells.
MEDIA-000001 may support discovery but does not alone satisfy success criteria.
